League.title: League
League.description: Represents a football league or competition.

id.description: Unique identifier for the League entity.

name.description: The official name of the football league (e.g., 'Premier League').

country.description: The country where the league is primarily based (e.g., 'England').

logoUrl.description: URL to the official logo of the league.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a football team participating in matches.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

name.description: The official name of the football team (e.g., 'Manchester United').

country.description: The country the team is from (e.g., 'England').

logoUrl.description: URL to the official logo or crest of the team.

primaryLeagueId.description: Reference to the primary League this team belongs to. (Relationship: League 1:N Team)

Match.title: Match
Match.description: Represents an upcoming or past football match, cached in Firestore.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Match entity, from TheSportsDB.

kickOff.description: The scheduled date and time when the match kicks off.

league.description: Name of the league the match belongs to.

stadium.description: The name of the stadium where the match will be played.

Prediction.title: Prediction
Prediction.description: Represents a cached, AI-generated forecast for a specific football match.

summary.description: A brief, AI-generated summary of key insights supporting this prediction.

mostConfidentPick.description: The most confident pick derived from AI analysis for this match.

confidenceScore.description: A numerical score indicating the confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0 to 100).

predictionTimestamp.description: The timestamp when this prediction was generated or last updated.

lastSync.description: Timestamp of the last successful data synchronization with the external API.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Cache of football matches, fetched from TheSportsDB. Documents are overwritten periodically. This collection is publicly readable.

/predictions/{matchId}.description: Cache of AI-generated predictions. A document is created on-demand when a user requests an analysis for a specific match. Publicly readable.

/system/{docId}.description: Stores internal system state, such as the timestamp of the last API data sync. Used by the client-side cron job to determine if a new data fetch is needed. Publicly readable, writable only by authenticated users.
